scripts.seed:local: npm run seed:sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=./generated/seed-lessons.sql --yes
scripts.seed:remote: npm run seed:sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=./generated/seed-lessons.sql --yes
scripts.db:test:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
scripts.db:test:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
